title: 249 Mathematics 4.   Cut out another rectangle of length   b   units and breadth   a   units
subject: Mathematics
activityTitle: 249 Mathematics 4.   Cut out another rectangle of length   b   units and breadth   a   units
objective: To obtain a formula for the area of a trapezium
materials:
Cardboard,   coloured   glaze   papers,   adhesive,
scissors.
procedure:
1.   Take a piece of cardboard to serve as a base for the activity.
2.   Draw two identical trapeziums of parallel sides as ‘ a ’ and ‘ b ’ units on
a coloured paper and cut them out (see Fig. 1).
3.   Place them on the cardboard as shown in Fig. 2.
Fig. 1
Fig. 2

Therefore,   a 2   –   b 2  = ( a + b )   ( a – b ).
discussion:
The identity may be used for finding values of
1.   difference of two squares.
2.   some products involving two numbers.
3.   This identity may be used for simplification and factorisation of
algebraic expressions.
